meaning: n.国王,君主,(部落的)首领,纸牌中的Kvt.立...为王vi.做国王,统治
examples: He was the king of the cowboys.
The king and queen had fled.
For Black Americans, the primary figures have generally been preachers, notably Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.
Some, such as Synercid, which Aventis sold to King Pharmaceuticals today, are especially difficult to administer.
